title: Race to the Moon - Rewritten
description:
Remember the Race to the Moon series? Wish it was in a newer version of Minecraft? Well that's exactly what this pack is trying to achieve!

Race against your friends to be the first to the moon and beyond! Now on Modrinth and via Fabric.
body:
Remember Race to the Moon? Wish it was in a newer version of Minecraft? Well that's exactly what this pack is trying to achieve! Not every mod has a modern equivalent, but I've done my best to create an experience that's as close as possible.

Race against your friends to be the first to the moon and beyond! 

**Mods:**
- Entity Culling by tr7zw
- FerriteCore by malte0811
- Just Enough Items by Mezz
- Mod Menu by Terraformers
- Ad Astra by Terrarium
- Extended Drawers by MattiDragon
- Inmis by draylar
- Tree Harvester by Serilum
- Iron Chests by anner
- Xaero's Minimap by thexaero
- Eureka by rubydesic
- Terrestria by Terraformers
- Jade by Snownee
- ToroHealth Damage Indicators (Updated) by Retrixe and coolGi
- Additional Enchanted Miner by Kotori316
- Valhelsia Furniture by Valhelsia Inc
- Hephaestus by alphamode
- Tinkers Bounce Pad by MinecraftEinstein
- Botany Ores by JustSkitzo
- Mystcraft: Ages by Naomi and Apollo
- Just More Cakes by MinecraftEinstein
- Just Mob Heads by Serilum
- ChickensShed by holmraven
- Powah! by Technic4n
- Simple Hats by fonnymunkey
- Fluid Void Fading by DaFuqs

**Dependencies:**
- Botarium by Terrarium
- Resourceful Lib by Team Resourceful
- Resourceful Config by Team Resourceful
- Patchouli by williewillus and Vazkii
- Collective by Serilum
- Valkyrien Skies by rubydesic
- Cloth Config API by shedaniel
- Valhelsia Core by Valhelsia Inc
- Botany Pots by Darkhax
- Bookshelf by Darkhax
- owo-lib by glisco and BasiqueEvangelist
- Forge Config API Port by Fuzs
- Architectury by Shedaniel, MaxNeedsSnacks, and Juuz
- Trinkets by Emi
